selected_route.label: Modular C
selected_route.rationale: Seven independent theme modules form a recognizable C, combining theme variety, creator contributions, and one-click switching in a compact app-icon silhouette.
selected_route.watch_out: Keep module gaps visible at small sizes and avoid adding more colors or internal detail.
selected_route.next_step: Approve the vector draft, then replace the desktop icon source and regenerate macOS and Windows icon packs.
